g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a CAN DBC file and how is it used in model-based testing?')
sendPrompt('What are state machines in CAN model-based testing?')
sendPrompt('How are CAN signal properties defined for property-based testing?')
sendPrompt('How does model-based test case generation work for CAN?')
sendPrompt('How does property-based testing work for CAN bus systems?')
sendPrompt('What does a generated CAN test suite contain?')
sendPrompt('How is a CAN test runner implemented?')
sendPrompt('What coverage metrics are used for CAN test suites?')
sendPrompt('What does a CAN test failure report contain?')
sendPrompt('How is a CAN regression test suite maintained?')
